name: file_write
_comment: Golden tape for the file-write task-enforcement path. User asks TITAN to save notes to a file; agent.ts task-enforcement regex hits ('write|save|create ... file|notes|md'), the system prompt picks up 'You MUST use write_file or edit_file to save it', and the model emits a write_file tool call. Two-round exchange.

messages.content: Write a markdown file at /tmp/notes.md with the heading 'Sprint 4 retro' and a one-line summary 'Shipped widget gallery and telemetry default'.

function.name: write_file

response.content: Saved /tmp/notes.md — 62 bytes, with the Sprint 4 retro heading and your one-liner.
